title: Availability, Disaster Recovery, and Validation · Protocol Recall
summary: Define recovery objectives and prove branch, service, configuration, and site recovery under realistic failures. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a tested network continuity plan after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Define RPO and RTO from business impact and map them to backup, replication, restoration, and test requirements.
Use MTTR and MTBF as population and process indicators without treating averages as individual guarantees.
Compare cold, warm, and hot sites by readiness, data, network, staffing, cost, and activation time.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.shell:
# comptia-network-plus safe operations evidence notebook
# Commands run only in the deterministic browser simulator.
# Add one observation, command, expected signal, and conclusion per activity.
